title: Health Care Affordability Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill makes it easier for people to get help paying for health insurance. Right now, people who make more than four times the poverty level cannot get tax credits to help pay for their insurance, but this bill removes that limit so more people can get help. The bill also keeps lower payment rates that were temporarily put in place, which means people will pay less of their income toward health insurance based on how much money they make. These changes were supposed to end soon, but this bill makes them permanent so people can keep getting this extra help with their health insurance costs.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.

sections.title: Section 1  Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Health Care Affordability Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2  Increase in Eligibility for Credit
sections.text: This section changes who can get help paying for health insurance through tax credits. Currently, people who make more than four hundred percent of the federal poverty level cannot get these credits. This law removes that limit so more people can get help. The law also sets up a new table that shows how much people have to pay for health insurance based on their income. People who make up to one hundred fifty percent of the poverty level pay nothing. People who make between one hundred fifty and two hundred percent pay between zero and two percent of their income. People who make between two hundred and two hundred fifty percent pay between two and four percent. People who make between two hundred fifty and three hundred percent pay between four and six percent. People who make between three hundred and four hundred percent pay between six and eight and a half percent. People who make four hundred percent or more pay eight and a half percent of their income. The law also removes some old rules about when coverage is considered affordable. These changes will start for tax years beginning after December thirty first, two thousand twenty five.
